$comment: Velarro Estate - screen manifest built from the Approved Wireframes section metadata (node 14366:82579, retrieved 2026-07-01). All 116 top-level frames are accounted for. Purposes/modules/routes are name-derived assumptions until enrichment marks them Figma verified.

totals.breakpointNote: Every page frame is 1440px desktop (one at 1459px). No tablet or mobile variants exist in the approved section - responsive behavior below 1440 is an open item (U-10).
